response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong breadth across TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and some Java/C++ exposure, but the resume shows no substantive recent work in Java, Kotlin, Spring, or JVM internals — all core requirements for this enterprise IDE/JVM tooling role. Java is listed only as a skill and appears briefly in older roles (robotic arms, mobile orchestration at Altom), with no Kotlin, Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or IDE-internals experience evident. The only IDE-adjacent work is C/C++ contributions to LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. Fit is weak for the specific technical focus.
strengths: Strong engineering breadth and long track record on complex, large-scale systems
Prior C/C++ IDE contribution experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, OSS tooling and test frameworks
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin or Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience
JVM and Java work is minimal and dated; recent stack is TypeScript/Node and DLang
No evidence of language tooling or modern IDE internals work

key_factors.factor: No recent IDE internals or language tooling work
